ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.title: Artoria Caster
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.description: The Child of Prophecy from the Britain of fae, sent across the Inner Sea to save a doomed land — and still trying, one journey at a time. She forges Caliburn Stars and mana as a Caster, then opens a reckless summer Berserker window to cash them in as devastating Criticals. Around Caliburn nullifies the unstoppable; Hope Will Camelot executes.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.goldMonolog: I won't hoard this shine for myself. If I can turn it into someone's hope, that's enough for me.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.eventDeathP: It's not over yet. As long as I still hold the hope I was lent, I'll rise again as many times as it takes.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.aromaPrinci: Even the smallest star can become hope, so long as someone looks up at it—I am that kind of light.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.banter.aliv: The real fight starts here. Come on, chin up—let's move forward together!
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.banter.dead: I'm sorry… for being so weak. But I can still stand. Just a little longer—I'll keep going.
